EXAMPLE 3: 

The patient is under a plan of care in which the physician or allowed practitioner orders 
I.V. medication administration every 2 weeks. The last day covered by the plan of care is 
July 31. The patient's next I.V. medication administration is scheduled for August 5 and 
the physician or allowed practitioner does not sign the plan of care until August 6. The
